articles.title: I Shipped My First iPhone App This Year. Here’s What I Most Hope to See at WWDC
articles.summary: The author, a tech columnist and new iPhone app developer, shares his hopes for Apple's WWDC, focusing on features that will enhance his app, Contextly. He is particularly interested in the App Intents feature for Siri, which would allow users to interact with apps using voice commands without opening the applications directly. He believes this feature, if well-designed and implemented, could significantly benefit small apps by increasing their discoverability and utility.
articles.content: The author, a tech columnist and new iPhone app developer, shares his hopes for Apple's WWDC, focusing on features that will enhance his app, Contextly. He is particularly interested in the App Intents feature for Siri, which would allow users to interact with apps using voice commands without opening the applications directly. He believes this feature, if well-designed and implemented, could significantly benefit small apps by increasing their discoverability and utility.

The recent Eaton Fire lawsuit further underscores the persistent risk of wildfire liabilities.

articles.title: Garmin Fenix 7: Multisport GPS Watch for Serious Performance
articles.summary: The Garmin Fenix 7 is a robust multisport GPS smartwatch engineered for athletes and outdoor enthusiasts, offering advanced training metrics, reliable navigation, and extended battery life. It caters to US consumers with features like structured workout guidance, recovery estimates, and daily activity tracking, competing in the premium sports watch segment. The device's rugged design and global satellite support make it suitable for a wide range of outdoor activities and professional use in remote locations.
